title: orchis sambucina var. hungarica
intro: Orchis sambucina var. hungarica, also known as Hungarian lady's slipper, is a variety of the Orchis sambucina plant, a type of orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Orchis sambucina var. hungarica include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
